system.description: The ring is made of tiny bits of bone wired together. It must be worn for at least a day per year of the bearer's life before it begins to work. When placed on a source of information, the ring sifts it until the ring speaks the information's "language." The bearer can see through riddles, read arcane texts, and break code with ease.
system.additional_info: Legend says 32 demons voluntarily gave some of their bone to be part of this ring, and it was released among humans to cause chaos through greater understanding.
